topics.title: Can I run AI locally?

filter.search_intent: ✅ 用户会搜 'how to run ai locally', 'run llm on my computer'
filter.keywords_exist: ✅ 立刻能想出 5+ 个 long-tail 词
filter.small_site_can_rank: ✅ 教程类内容，个人站可以排
filter.sustainable: ✅ 隐私+成本驱动，持续需求
filter.monetizable: ✅ 硬件 affiliate(GPU/Mac) + AI 课程

sample: best ai to run locally for coding
can you run ai locally on mac
hardware needed to run ai locally
easiest way to run ai locally
best locally run ai image generator

topics.decision: KD22 + Vol210 + CPC$3.48 + 165个suggest补全 → GO。教程站，硬件affiliate变现。

topics.title: Understudy – Teach a desktop agent by demonstrating a task once

filter.search_intent: ✅ 用户会搜 'ai desktop agent', 'desktop automation ai'
filter.keywords_exist: ✅ desktop ai agent, ai agent for desktop, ai task automation

topics.decision: 需求真实(60 suggest, CPC$7.64高)，但主词KD74太高。需找更长尾变体如 'open source desktop ai agent', 'free ai desktop automation tool'。观察。

topics.title: Mouser: An open source alternative to Logi-Plus mouse software

filter.search_intent: ✅ Logitech 用户确实在搜替代品
filter.keywords_exist: ✅ logi options plus alternative, logitech software alternative
filter.sustainable: ✅ 只要 Logi 软件还臃肿就有需求

topics.decision: 量太小(Vol20)，CPC为0无变现。除非做更大的 'bloatware alternatives' 聚合站。观察。
